title: RSPCA faux leather collar dog puppy pet black bone embellishments 2.5x65cm
features: Make walks with your dog easy, comfortable and in style with this Faux Leather Collar from RSPCA.
This faux leather collar comes in four assorted colours: red, black, grey & brown and has 6 bone embellishments.
Made from tough and durable yet soft faux leather.

When fitting your dog’s new collar, it is important that it is comfortable and secure. An appropriately fitted collar should allow two fingers to be placed on their edge side (not flat). To fit comfortably between the collar and the dog’s neck.
